zh.lifeSummary: 當Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock於大約1489年出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，他的父親Sir John Woodcock39歲，母親Lady Ursula Woodcock34歲。他於1509年與Isabel Keurden在英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1542年5月13日在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock于大约1489年出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，他的父亲Sir John Woodcock39岁，母亲Lady Ursula Woodcock34岁。他于1509年与Isabel Keurden在英国英格兰藍卡爾爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1542年5月13日在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Woodcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English wodecok ‘woodcock’ (Old English wuducocc, a compound of Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cocc ‘cock, bird’), a type of bird that is notoriously easy to catch. Therefore, the name might have been either for a person who caught or sold woodcock, or a nickname for a gullible person.

in some cases, because there can be confusion between -cock and -cot in surnames, and therefore the name may also be a variant of Woodcott, a habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + cot ‘cottage, shelter’, such as Woodcott in Cheshire and Hampshire or Woodcote in Hampshire, Surrey, Oxfordshire, Warwickshire, and Shropshire, or from any residence at a cottage in or near a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock was born about 1489, in London, Middlesex, England, his father, Sir John Woodcock, was 39 and his mother, Lady Ursula Woodcock, was 34. He married Isabel Keurden in 1509, in Cuerden, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 May 1542, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

Il a épousé Isabel Keurden en 1509, à Cuerden, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 mai 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock(이)가 대략 1489년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Woodcock(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Ursula Woodcock(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1509년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c르든에서 Isabel Keurden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1542년 5월 13일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Knight - Sir Joseph William Woodcock родился около 1489 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Woodcock было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Ursula Woodcock, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Keurden в 1509 г. в местности куирден, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 мая 1542 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
